forgotPassword.sentHint: Still no email? The address may not be registered here, or your account may be linked to Google — try "Sign in with Google" from the login page.

resetPassword.subtitleValid: Your link is active. Set your new password below.

intros: You might want to try this today
This is on our mind today
Shall we try this in the kitchen today?

tatli: Kills a sweet craving, and does the job when guests drop by.
Nobody can resist the smell of a homemade dessert.
kokteyl: When the weekend rolls in, get the glasses ready.
Too much effort for a quiet night — just right for a real celebration.
corba: A warming start — medicine on a cold day.
One spoonful takes the edge off the day.
salata: A fresh touch for the table — light and still satisfying.
Not a side dish — the kind of salad that earns main-character energy.
kahvalti: Made for a leisurely Sunday breakfast.
Lifts the morning mood in just a few minutes.
atistirmalik: Small but effective — movie night or a surprise guest.
hard: Takes patience, but the result is genuinely impressive.
Treat it as a weekend project — the table will reward you.
quick: Practical and easy — a friend on tired days.
A filling option that doesn't even take half an hour.
veryQuick: On the table in 20 minutes — fast, not careless.
The first thing that comes to mind when you want something quick.
light: For those keeping it light — without cutting back on flavour.
hearty: Filling and nourishing — it won't leave you hungry.
A well-earned dinner at the end of a long day.
popularVariations: A recipe the community has tried and made their own.
See how many variations it has — check the adaptations tab.
featured: An editor's favourite — simple but memorable.

empty: {ctx}I couldn't find a recipe you can make with {count} ingredient(s). Want to add a couple more, or shall we loosen the filters?
{ctx}No match for this combination. Add more ingredients or relax the filters.
{ctx}Nothing matched what you have. Try more staple ingredients (eggs, onion, tomato, etc.).
perfectMany: {ctx}You can make {count} recipes exactly with what you have. I put the fastest ones on top.
{ctx}Nice pantry: you don't even need to shop for {count} recipes.
{ctx}Luckily you have {count} options — all fully covered.
perfect2: {ctx}Two recipes need nothing extra: {title1} and {title2}. Which one fits your mood?
With what you have, you can make {title1} or {title2}. Both have zero missing.
Perfect fit on 2 recipes: {title1} and {title2}. The rest need a bit of shopping.
perfect1: {ctx}You don't need to buy anything for {title} — perfect fit. A few close alternatives sit below.
Head to the kitchen: {title} is ready with what you have. Others need a couple of items.
Only one exact match: {title}. If you want alternatives, the ones below need just 1–2 extras.
closeCall: {ctx}No perfect match, but {title} only needs {missing} — quick market run.
Closest option is {title}. Grab {missing} and you're set.
{title} is missing {missing}. Everything else is already in your kitchen.
fallback: {ctx}No exact match, but {title} uses the most of your ingredients. Missing items listed below.
Best candidate: {title}. I listed the missing items below.
{title} is a good starting point. Check the card for what's missing.
notesFirstPerfect: Best match. You can use all of your ingredients.
Top pick — perfect fit and the strongest result.
notesFirstOneMissing: One ingredient missing ({missing}), the rest is ready.
notesFastest: Fastest option — on the table in {minutes} minutes.
The quickest one. Perfect for a hungry surprise guest.
notesPerfectAlt: Nothing missing, you could pick this one too.
Everything is there — keep it as plan B.
Another exact match. File it as a backup.
notesHard: Takes patience, but the result is impressive.
A bit ambitious — try it when you have time.
Needs some skill, but whoever sits at the table will notice.
aiCommentary.notesLongest: Slow cooker — you can leave it on the stove.
pantryOnly: {ctx}You've only listed pantry staples (salt, pepper, oil). Add a vegetable, protein, or grain and I'll surface real matches.
{ctx}These are all pantry items — add one real ingredient (say, tomato, chicken, or lentils) and the suggestions will click into place.
{ctx}Pantry-only input won't get us far. Throw in one non-staple ingredient and try again.
manyIngredients: {ctx}You've loaded up the pantry — {count} recipes match. {title} is at the top.
{ctx}That's a generous pantry. {count} recipes fit, starting with {title}.
{ctx}With this much to work with, {count} recipes turn up — {title} leads the pack.
singleIngredient: {ctx}Starting with just {ingredient}? {title} is the closest match.
{ctx}One ingredient to work with — {title} is your best bet.

broadcast.pageDescription: This form creates an in-app notification per user for the target audience. No email is sent. Suspended and deleted accounts are excluded.
broadcast.tip1: Keep the title short and actionable ("New: 1100 recipes live").
broadcast.tip2: Use an internal link (e.g. "/kesfet"). A click marks the notification as read.
broadcast.tip3: Every broadcast is written to ModerationAction; who sent what and when stays in the log.
broadcast.confirmPrompt: This notification will go {target}{verified}. Are you sure?

preferences.allergensHelp: Recipes containing these will be pushed down in listings. Not medical advice — always double-check ingredient labels.

cookieBanner.message: Tarifle uses only 4 essential cookies — session, CSRF, language and theme. No advertising, analytics or tracking cookies.

legalHub.subtitle: Transparent answers about how Tarifle works — in plain language, without the legalese. Pick a topic below.

kvkk.title: KVKK Privacy Notice
kvkk.description: What data we process, why, and under which legal basis — Turkish Data Protection Law (6698).

kullanim.title: Terms of Use
kullanim.description: Membership, user content, allergen info and the limits of our liability.

gizlilik.title: Privacy Policy
gizlilik.description: Which infrastructure partners we rely on, how long we keep data, when deletion really ends.

cerez.title: Cookie Policy
cerez.description: Just 4 essential cookies. No ads, no analytics, no fingerprinting — here's why.

guvenlik.title: Security
guvenlik.description: What you do to keep your account safe + what we harden on our side.

iletisim.title: Contact Privacy Notice
iletisim.description: When you reach us by email, which data is processed and how long it is kept.

legalSecurity.subtitle: Account safety is two-sided: you pick up a few habits, we harden the infrastructure side. Both lists are below, explicit.
legalSecurity.accountStrongPassword: Choose a strong, unique password: at least 10 characters, mixing upper/lowercase + numbers + symbols. Don't reuse passwords from other sites here.
legalSecurity.accountEmailVerify: After signup, click the email verification link — unverified accounts cannot post reviews or share adaptations.
legalSecurity.accountLogout: If you're on a shared computer, click "Log out" when you're done; don't leave the session open.
legalSecurity.accountNoShare: Your username + password are yours alone. Don't share them with anyone, not even the Tarifle team — we will never contact you asking for your password.
legalSecurity.deviceDevice: Keep the OS + browser up to date on the device you use to access Tarifle.
legalSecurity.devicePhishing: Watch out for suspicious emails like "your account was suspended, click here" — real emails from Tarifle always come from @tarifle.app or our Resend sender domain.
legalSecurity.deviceAntivirus: Don't install browser extensions from unknown sources; they can read your session cookies.
legalSecurity.httpsBody: tarifle.app is served over HTTPS with the HSTS header — all traffic is encrypted. Any HTTP request is auto-redirected to HTTPS.
legalSecurity.passwordHashBody: Your password is never stored in plaintext. bcrypt with cost factor 10 is used for one-way hashing — even if the database leaks, the raw password cannot be recovered.
legalSecurity.emailVerifyBody: Email verification is required after signup; forgotten passwords are reset via a time-limited (1 hour), single-use link.
legalSecurity.rateLimitBody: Login attempts, password reset requests, and review submissions are rate-limited per IP + user. Brute-force attempts are blocked by an Upstash Redis sliding-window algorithm.
legalSecurity.moderationBody: Review and adaptation submissions go through an automatic preflight filter (blacklist keywords, URLs, all-caps spam, repetition patterns). Suspicious content lands in the moderation queue and cannot be published without admin approval.
legalSecurity.infraBody: Cloudflare DNS + bot protection, Vercel Edge firewall, Neon PostgreSQL enforcing SSL connections. Error tracking via Sentry with a PII filter (user data stays private).
legalSecurity.backupBody: Neon offers automatic point-in-time recovery — any moment in the last 7 days can be restored. For critical data loss, prod and dev branches are isolated — nothing reaches prod without dev testing.
legalSecurity.reportBody: Spotted a security issue? Email koz.devs@gmail.com with subject "Security" — response time 48 hours. Thanks for reporting; we prefer responsible disclosure.

legalContactNotice.subtitle: When you email us at koz.devs@gmail.com, we process your data only for responding to you and only within the scope of your message. Details below.
legalContactNotice.kapsamBody: This notice applies to anyone — visitor or member — who reaches us through email, outside the Tarifle membership flow. General platform data processing is covered by the KVKK Privacy Notice as a separate document.
legalContactNotice.dataName: Your name / sender name you provide
legalContactNotice.dataEmail: Your email address (Gmail returns it automatically)
legalContactNotice.dataMessage: The content of your message (whatever you write — may contain personal data)
legalContactNotice.purposeResponse: Understanding and replying to your request — KVKK Art. 5/2-f (legitimate interest: mutual communication).
legalContactNotice.purposeLegal: Responding if a legal request or complaint arises — KVKK Art. 5/2-ç (legal obligation).
legalContactNotice.purposeSpam: Detecting spam and malicious requests — KVKK Art. 5/2-f (legitimate interest).
legalContactNotice.retentionBody: Email threads stay in the Gmail account while actively being tracked. After resolution, we keep them for up to 1 year for reference and then delete. If a legal process is triggered, retention follows the mandatory statutory period.
legalContactNotice.transferBody: Your messages are read only by Tarifle's administrator. They are not shared with third parties — apart from Google Mail infrastructure (Gmail servers in EU/US). Our outbound mail provider Resend (EU) only handles mail we SEND out; incoming mail lands directly in Gmail.
legalContactNotice.rightsBody: You can request deletion, correction or a copy of the email you sent. The process is covered in KVKK Privacy Notice, Section 7 — send an email with the subject line "KVKK Veri Talebi" to the same address.

legalCookies.subtitle: Tarifle uses cookies at the minimum level needed for functionality. No tracking or advertising cookies.
legalCookies.introBody: Cookies are small text files a website sends to your browser. They're commonly used for user sessions, preferences, and some security checks.
legalCookies.essentialBody: Required for the site to work — cannot be disabled.
legalCookies.essentialSession: Logged-in user session (HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax). Cleared on logout.
legalCookies.essentialCsrf: CSRF protection on form actions. Valid for the session.
legalCookies.essentialLocale: Your language choice (TR/EN). 1 year, updated when you switch languages.
legalCookies.functionalBody: These improve the experience; the site still works if they're disabled but some preferences won't persist.
legalCookies.functionalPrefsHint: Age confirmation (for alcoholic drink recipes), dismissed announcement IDs — stored in localStorage, not cookies (longer-lived, device-specific).
legalCookies.noTrackingBody: Tarifle does NOT use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, ad-network cookies, behavioral tracking or third-party fingerprinting. This isn't an oversight — it's a deliberate choice. Running a recipe platform doesn't require these tools, and you don't deserve to become an ad-targeting data point just because you look up a stew. Sentry (error tracking) also doesn't use cookies — it correlates server-side via a session ID header only, nothing lands in your browser.
legalCookies.controlBrowser: You can clear or block cookies via browser settings: "Settings → Privacy → Cookies" works for Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge.
legalCookies.controlDelete: If you trigger "Delete account", the session cookie is invalidated immediately and your account + adaptations + reviews are permanently removed within 90 days.
legalCookies.controlImpact: If you block essential cookies you cannot log in — session persistence becomes impossible.
legalCookies.updateBody: If the cookie policy changes this page is updated and the "Last update" date at the top reflects it. For material changes, a notification is sent to your registered email address.

recipe.aiCrossLink: What else can I make with these ingredients?
recipe.allergenDisclaimer: Allergens are derived automatically from the ingredient list, covering the main groups of the EU-14 food allergen standard (gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, seafood, sesame, celery, mustard). Cross-contamination (shared kitchen equipment, shared surfaces) isn't tracked — if you have a serious allergy, review the full ingredient list yourself and ask about preparation.
recipe.variationsEmpty: No adaptations yet. Be the first to add one!
recipe.tagTooltipVegetarian: Vegetarian — no meat, poultry or fish

nutrition.title: Nutrition (per serving)
nutrition.approximateNote: Approximate values, derived from ingredient amounts using USDA FoodData Central and TÜBİTAK Turkish Food Composition Database. Actual values can vary by roughly ±20% depending on cooking method, brand, and portion size. For diet or medical conditions, consult a dietitian or doctor.

empty.title: No recipes found
